lines.text: Patio Rentals | Walt Disney World Resort
Enjoy the delights of peaceful patios at select Disney Resort hotels.
Oasis Patio at Disney’s Polynesian Resort
Relax in your own private shaded area close to the pool—complete with cushioned lounge chairs, towels and more!
Hungry? You can pick up to-go goodies from Barefoot Pool Bar or Pineapple Lanai or mobile order breakfast, lunch, dinner and snacks from Captain Cook’s!

Oasis Patios accommodate up to 6 Guests and are available for rent on a first-come, first-served basis to Guests of Disney’s Polynesian Resort only. For advance reservations and pricing information, call (407) WDW-PLAY [(407) 939-7529]. Guests under 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call.
Learn about renting patios, amenities and other important information.
Advance reservations are highly recommended as patios book quickly.
Patios at Disney’s Polynesian Village Resort can be booked by Guests of Disney’s Polynesian Village Resort only. A MagicBand or card or Resort ID is required at patio check-in.
One Guest in the party must be at least 18 years old.
Guests who need to cancel patio reservations must provide 24-hour notice. The full price of your reservation will be charged in the event of no-shows or same-day cancellations.
Rentals may be cancelled by the Resort hotel due to inclement weather. Guests will not be charged in this case.
